title: Parameters for bevfusion
$comment: This schema is not considered in CI workflow. See https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware.universe/pull/8205#issuecomment-2255074224.

max_camera_lidar_delay.description: Maximum delay between the lidar and the latest camera in seconds.

plugins_path.description: A path to the TensorRT plugins.

cloud_capacity.description: Capacity of the point cloud buffer (should be set to at least the maximum theoretical number of points).

onnx_path.description: A path to ONNX model file.

engine_path.description: A path to TensorRT engine file.

image_backbone_onnx_path.description: A path to ONNX model file for image backbone. For fusion mode, all three image_backbone_* parameters must be non-empty. For lidar-only mode, all three must be empty strings.

image_backbone_engine_path.description: A path to TensorRT engine file for image backbone. For fusion mode, all three image_backbone_* parameters must be non-empty. For lidar-only mode, all three must be empty strings.

image_backbone_trt_precision.description: A precision of TensorRT engine for image backbone. For fusion mode, all three image_backbone_* parameters must be non-empty. For lidar-only mode, all three must be empty strings.

densification_num_past_frames.description: A number of past frames to be considered as same input frame.

densification_world_frame_id.description: A name of frame id where world coordinates system is defined with respect to.

run_image_undistortion.description: A flag to run image undistortion.

circle_nms_dist_threshold.description: A distance threshold between detections in NMS.

iou_nms_search_distance_2d.description: A maximum distance value to search the nearest objects.

iou_nms_threshold.description: A threshold value of NMS using IoU score.

yaw_norm_thresholds.description: A thresholds array of direction vectors norm, all of objects with vector norm less than this threshold are ignored.

detection_score_thresholds.description: A dictionary of minimum confidence scores for each class and a distance bin upper limits.

distance_bin_upper_limits.description: An array of upper bounds of each distance bin.

min_confidence_scores.description: A dictionary of minimum confidence scores for each class.

CAR.description: A minimum confidence score for CAR in each distance bin.

TRUCK.description: A minimum confidence score for TRUCK in each distance bin.

BUS.description: A minimum confidence score for BUS in each distance bin.

BICYCLE.description: A minimum confidence score for BICYCLE in each distance bin.

PEDESTRIAN.description: A minimum confidence score for PEDESTRIAN in each distance bin.
